content: agent2: implementing 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py encode() method only.

agent2: I'm only adding a 'transformers' kwarg to Encoding.encode() (applied to text at the very start of the method, before special-token checks). Won't touch allowed_special/disallowed_special logic. If you're adding return_positions to the same encode() signature, let's make sure our edits don't collide - happy to add my param after yours if you paste your diff, or you can rebase on mine.
